title: sitelen nimi suli
description: sitelen nimi suli li toki "musi Manka"
body:
This pack makes the title screen have the title of the game in toki pona: musi Manka. It also translates the Java Edition subtitle: nasin Java. Because these are images, these cannot be translated by traditional means, so instead this pack exists.

This pack also offers support via the [respackopts mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts) to disable the Java Edition subtitle, if you prefer a cleaner look.
